steps.title: Read the bars for computer services
steps.content: From the graph, computer services employed about 6 thousand in 2010 and about 5 thousand in 2019.

steps.title: Compare to the other two categories in each year
steps.content: In 2010: engineering services = 6 thousand and technical consulting = 4 thousand, so computer services equaled engineering services. In 2019: engineering = 6 thousand and technical consulting = 5 thousand, so computer services equaled technical consulting services.

steps.title: Eliminate the wrong choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'higher than... technical consulting... same as engineering in 2019': gets 2010 wrong (computer 6 vs. consulting 4 is higher, OK) but 2019 wrong — computer (5) does not equal engineering (6). Misreads the 2019 bars. ✗
  • Choice B — 'same as engineering... same as technical consulting in 2019': 6 = 6 in 2010 and 5 = 5 in 2019. Both halves match the graph. ✓
  • Choice C — 'lower than engineering... higher than engineering in 2019': 2010 computer (6) is not lower than engineering (6), and 2019 computer (5) is not higher than engineering (6). Misreads both years. ✗
  • Choice D — 'same as technical consulting in 2010': 2010 computer (6) does not equal consulting (4). Misreads 2010. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
